code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut max_v = 0
mut min_v = 0
mut init = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_num
      let v = cur * sign
      if not init
        max_v = v
        min_v = v
        init = true
      else
        if v > max_v
          max_v = v
        end
        if v < min_v
          min_v = v
        end
      end
      in_num = false
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
    end
  else
    if not in_num and b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else
      if not in_num and b == 43
        sign = 1
        in_num = true
      else
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
          in_num = true
        end
      end
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let v = cur * sign
  if not init
    max_v = v
    min_v = v
    init = true
  else
    if v > max_v
      max_v = v
    end
    if v < min_v
      min_v = v
    end
  end
end

println("max=#{max_v}")
println("min=#{min_v}")
